description_long: This object is a perfectly smooth sphere with a sky-blue surface, adorned with soft, painterly white clouds scattered across its exterior. The clouds vary in size and shape, giving the impression of a stylized sky scene wrapped around the entire object. There are no visible features such as wings, engines, windows, or landing gear, and the surface is uniformly curved with no protrusions or indentations. The coloration is consistent, with the blue background dominating and the white clouds providing visual contrast. The object appears to be made of a hard, glossy material, possibly plastic or ceramic, with a highly reflective finish. There are no markings, text, or functional components visible anywhere on the surface.
description: A glossy, sky-blue sphere with soft, white clouds painted across its smooth surface, resembling a stylized sky. No airplane features or functional parts are visible.
description_view_0: This view shows a blue sphere with several large, soft-edged white clouds, mostly concentrated on the upper left and center.
description_view_1: This angle reveals fewer clouds, with more open blue space and smaller cloud patches scattered across the surface.
description_view_2: Here, the sphere displays a cluster of large, fluffy clouds dominating the center, with blue sky visible around the edges.
description_view_3: This view features a mix of medium and small clouds, with a prominent cloud formation on the lower right and more blue sky visible at the top.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: No wings or wingspan configuration visible; the object is a featureless sphere.
attribute_engine_type: No engines visible on the surface.
attribute_tail_design: No tail or tail configuration present.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No cockpit or cockpit features present.
